works.caption: 媽祖是守護海洋的女神，將大甲鎮瀾宮至於海底，馬祖隨興坐屋頂，象徵海女出身的她不拘小節，環顧海面保護漁民一帆風順大豐收。
兒時蟬鳴讀書聲，是我們共同的回憶，藉由青面姬蟬爬上腦門，象徵蟬叫不絕於耳，雖然小男孩在書堆中寫功課，卻被蟬鳴喚起玩性，思緒像脫了線的風箏和從高空滑水般，早已神遊到九霄雲外。
征服太空一直是人類的夢想，雖然月球表面寸草不生，但科學家卻發現月亮岩石裡含有少量水分子的存在，如果月球地底下有水的話，先被發現的生物，也許不是玉兔，比較可能是青蛙。
鮭魚具有洄游性，會溯河而上回到牠出生的上游交配產卵。故以櫻花下的少女，表現期待愛情的愁緒，藉由奔流的溪水，象徵雌雄魚逆流而上交配談情的意境。
2020年新冠病毒疫情嚴峻，研究發現跟蝙蝠的病毒基因相似。故本插畫在展翅飛翔的蝙蝠身上，畫上漂浮的病毒，象徵蝙蝠散播病毒，連蝙蝠俠都得戴上MIT（台灣製造）的口罩防疫。下方人群剪影則代表病毒藉由群聚感染擴散。
翩翩飛舞的蝴蝶，與長袖善舞的京劇花旦有異曲同工之妙，畫中女子捧著鮮花，驀然回首，一臉冷豔，彷彿鳳凰的化身，透過「莊周夢蝶」的故事，隱喻虛實讓人難以捉摸。

works.src: images/意識的裂變與重組_水火同源.jpg
works.thumb: images/意識的裂變與重組_水火同源m.jpg
works.caption: 本創作運用 Adobe Photoshop 強大的色彩映射（Gradient Map）與液化（Liquify）技術，建構出一個意識裂變的超現實場景。畫面左側以冷調的紫與亮藍呈現靜止的側臉，水流狀的線條象徵理性的思考與內斂的情感；右側則瞬間爆裂成熱烈的橘紅與亮黃，飛散的像素與碎塊寓意靈感的爆發與舊思維的瓦解。藉由高飽和度的互補色對比，不僅強化了「理性水」與「感性火」在思維衝突中的張力，更探討了個體在數位時代中，資訊超載導致意識解體，進而重組成全新認知的動態過程。水火同源，皆是創意的起點。
works.captionEn: This work utilizes the powerful Gradient Map and Liquify techniques of Adobe Photoshop to construct a surreal scene of consciousness fragmentation. On the left, a still profile is presented in cool purple and bright blue tones, with flowing lines symbolizing rational thought and restrained emotion; on the right, it instantly explodes into vibrant orange-red and bright yellow, with scattered pixels and fragments representing the burst of inspiration and the disintegration of old ways of thinking. Through the contrast of highly saturated complementary colors, the tension between "rational water" and "emotional fire" in the conflict of thought is not only amplified, but also explored the dynamic process by which information overload in the digital age leads to the disintegration of consciousness, which then reconstructs into new cognition. Water and fire share a common origin, both being the starting point of creativity.

works.caption:
在設計的修業旅途上，如何將抽象的志向具象化？我在輔大應用美術系的 Photoshop 作業中，以一輛疾馳的高性能跑車作為主體，巧妙地將個人頭像嵌入駕駛座，象徵自己正是掌控這場藝術冒險的舵手。畫面中跑車輪框旋轉的動態模糊（Motion Blur），配合道路延伸的流線感，營造出時速百公里的視覺衝擊力，讓人感受到創作者對於學習設計的滿腔熱忱。
這件作品不僅是單純的影像合成，更結合了精緻的後期特效處理。背景中躍動的「輔大應美」四個金屬質感立體字，與車身上的「AART」標誌遙相呼應，展現出強烈的系所歸屬感。最為吸睛的莫過於畫面左上方透出的強烈光暈（Lens Flare），不僅模擬了清晨或黃昏奔向陽光的真實感，更象徵著在輔大求學路上，前方的光明前景與希望。
works.captionEn:
On the journey of studying design, how can abstract aspirations be concretized? In my Photoshop assignment for the Department of Applied Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University, I used a speeding high-performance sports car as the main subject, cleverly embedding my own portrait into the driver's seat, symbolizing myself as the helmsman controlling this artistic adventure. The motion blur of the sports car's rotating wheels, combined with the streamlined extension of the road, creates a visual impact of speeding at 100 kilometers per hour, conveying the creator's passion for learning design.

This work is not merely a simple image composite; it also incorporates exquisite post-production effects. The four metallic, three-dimensional characters of "Fu Jen Catholic University Applied Arts" in the background echo the "AART" logo on the car, showcasing a strong sense of belonging to the department. Most eye-catching is the strong lens flare emanating from the upper left corner of the image, not only simulating the realism of rushing towards the sunlight at dawn or dusk, but also symbolizing the bright future and hope ahead on my academic journey at Fu Jen Catholic University.

works.src: images/夢啟山水_我與犬的墨色行旅.jpg
works.thumb: images/夢啟山水_我與犬的墨色行旅m.jpg
works.caption: 輔大應美系的數位合成作品，將我與愛犬的睡眠顯像，巧妙地融入一幅超現實的黑白山水夢境。畫面中，兩者的頭像如巨石般屹立，與枯木、飛瀑交織成景，象徵著意識深層的寧靜與與自然共生。背對鏡頭的行者牽著狗，踏著如鋼琴鍵般的白色階梯，緩緩走向遠方那抹溫暖的金光，這是一場關於夢想、陪伴與自我探索的墨色行旅，元方是等待我們的愛人。
works.captionEn: A digital composite artwork by the Department of Applied Fine Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University cleverly blends images of me and my beloved dog sleeping into a surreal black-and-white landscape dreamscape. In the image, our heads stand like giant rocks, interwoven with withered trees and cascading waterfalls, symbolizing a deep tranquility of consciousness and coexistence with nature. A traveler with his back to the camera leads his dog up a white staircase resembling piano keys, slowly walking towards a warm golden light in the distance. This is an ink-wash journey about dreams, companionship, and self-discovery, with Yuanfang as our beloved waiting.

works.src: images/雲端上的約定_伴你同行天國路.jpg
works.thumb: images/雲端上的約定_伴你同行天國路m.jpg
works.caption: 這幅作品是輔大應美系PS課堂作業，靈感源自對年邁愛犬離去的深深擔憂。畫面營造出一個縹緲的雲霧夢境，我和愛犬正踏上通往天堂的潔白階梯。階梯兩旁是柔軟的白雲，遠方是一輪溫暖、聖潔的明月，象徵著天堂的寧靜與美好。即使前路未知，我們依然緊緊相依，這是一場關於告別、守護與永恆承諾的影像敘事。
works.captionEn: This artwork was a Photoshop class assignment from the Department of Applied Fine Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University, inspired by the deep sorrow over the passing of my beloved elderly dog. The image creates a dreamlike, misty landscape where my dog ​​and I are ascending a pristine white staircase to heaven. Soft white clouds line the staircase, and in the distance, a warm and sacred moon symbolizes the tranquility and beauty of heaven. Even though the road ahead is unknown, we remain tightly entwined. This is a visual narrative about farewell, protection, and an eternal promise.

works.caption: 輔大應美系的數位影像作業，以「愛與願望」為核心概念。我將多年來與妻子出國旅遊留下的無數珍貴足跡，透過蒙太奇拼貼手法，匯聚成妻子燦爛的笑顏。每一張小照片都承載著一段異國記憶，而無數個片段最終拼湊出她最嚮往的心願環遊世界。
works.captionEn: This digital image project from the Department of Applied Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University uses "love and wishes" as its core concept. I used montage to combine countless precious memories from my wife's travels abroad over the years into her radiant smile. Each small photo carries a memory of a foreign land, and these countless fragments ultimately piece together her greatest wish: to travel the world.

works.src: images/_寒曦凝望_台北之巔的雪色黎明.jpg
works.thumb: images/_寒曦凝望_台北之巔的雪色黎明m.jpg
works.caption: 輔大應美系的數位影像作業，將經典的象山眺望台北 101 風景進行大膽的時空重塑。運用 Photoshop 調色與合成技術，將原本平實的大白天景致，轉化為大雪紛飛的黎明時分。畫面中，背對鏡頭的紅衣女子靜坐石上，與覆蓋白雪的植被共同守望著遠方微光的地平線。在寒冷的雪景與暖色日出的色彩對比下，營造出一種靜謐而超現實的孤寂美感，賦予了台北都市景觀嶄新的詩意想像。
works.captionEn: A digital image project by the Department of Applied Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University boldly reimagined the classic view of Taipei 101 from Elephant Mountain. Using Photoshop color correction and compositing techniques, the project transformed the ordinary daytime scene into a snowy dawn. In the image, a woman in red, her back to the camera, sits quietly on a rock, watching the distant, faintly lit horizon alongside the snow-covered vegetation. The contrast between the cold snowscape and the warm colors of the sunrise creates a tranquil yet surreal sense of solitary beauty, imbuing the Taipei cityscape with a fresh, poetic imagination.

works.src: images/冰封暢爽_舉杯台啤的痛快時刻.jpg
works.thumb: images/冰封暢爽_舉杯台啤的痛快時刻m.jpg
works.caption: 輔大應美系的數位影像處理作業。我應用課堂所學的冰磚合成技巧，將台啤經典的瓶裝與罐裝形象封存於晶瑩剔透的冰塊之中，背景搭配與好友舉杯對飲、泡沫噴濺的動態瞬間，營造出熱鬧歡騰的聚會氛圍，展現出台灣在地生活最純粹的情感連結。
works.captionEn: This was a digital image processing assignment from the Department of Applied Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University. I used the ice block compositing technique I learned in class to preserve the classic bottle and can images of Taiwan Beer within crystal-clear ice blocks. The background was set with dynamic moments of friends raising their glasses and the foam splashing, creating a lively and joyful party atmosphere that showcases the purest emotional connection to local life in Taiwan.

works.src: images/警鐘長鳴_生存桌遊_熊出沒_.jpg
works.thumb: images/警鐘長鳴_生存桌遊_熊出沒_m.jpg
works.caption: 輔大應美系的設計基礎作業。我以近年日本頻傳的「熊攻擊事件」為靈感，設計了這款生存對抗桌遊。玩家從右下角的營帳區出發，前往果園採集蘋果以獲取積分；然而，潛伏在左下角深山洞穴裡的熊會隨機出沒覓食，一旦遇到人類便會發起攻擊。玩家必須前往地圖中央的鐘樓，透過搖鈴警告村民，方能化解危機。此外，地圖中還隱藏了隨機尋寶的趣味要素，將真實社會議題轉化為具備冒險感與策略深度的遊戲體驗。
works.captionEn: This is a design fundamentals assignment from the Department of Applied Arts at Fu Jen Catholic University. Inspired by the frequent bear attacks in Japan in recent years, I designed this survival-themed board game. Players start from the camp area in the lower right corner and head to an orchard to collect apples and earn points. However, bears lurking in the deep mountain caves in the lower left corner will randomly appear to hunt, attacking any humans they encounter. Players must reach the clock tower in the center of the map and ring the bell to warn the villagers and avert the crisis. Furthermore, the map also hides elements of random treasure hunts, transforming real-world social issues into a game experience with both adventure and strategic depth.

works.src: images/_熊出沒_遊戲角色_小紅帽.jpg
works.thumb: images/_熊出沒_遊戲角色_小紅帽m.jpg
works.caption: 以日本首相高市早苗為圓形，搭配小紅帽的童話故事造型，提著籃子去果園採蘋果，遇到熊攻擊，如何提防摘蘋果的大人爾虞我詐並合作抗熊，考驗著小紅帽的智慧。
works.captionEn: The illustration features Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi in a circular shape, paired with a fairytale costume of Little Red Riding Hood. She is carrying a basket to pick apples in an orchard when she encounters a bear attack. How can she avoid the adults picking apples and cooperate to fight off the bear? This tests Little Red Riding Hood's wisdom.

works.src: images/_熊出沒_遊戲角色_日本黑熊.jpg
works.thumb: images/_熊出沒_遊戲角色_日本黑熊m.jpg
works.caption: 由於都市過度開發，威脅到深山中熊的生存範圍，紛紛下山覓食，對人類極不友善，隨著熊攻擊人的事件頻傳，日本甚至出動軍隊殺熊，停屍間堆滿熊屍，商人大發熊肉利市。
works.captionEn: Overdevelopment in cities has threatened the habitat of bears in the deep mountains, causing them to come down from the mountains in search of food. They are extremely unfriendly to humans. As bear attacks on people have become more frequent, Japan has even deployed its army to kill bears. Morgues are filled with bear carcasses, and merchants are making a fortune from bear meat.

works.caption: 以美國總統川普為原型，頭戴皇冠、手中聖經變成貿易教材，象徵他的重商主義和霸權心態，身上藍色衣服和紅色披肩，也以美國國旗配色。
works.captionEn: Modeled after US President Trump, the figure wears a crown and holds a Bible that serves as a trade textbook, symbolizing his mercantilism and hegemonic mentality. The blue clothes and red shawl are also in the colors of the American flag.

works.caption: 小阿姨在超市賣起司，三不五時會做蛋糕請大家吃，為了報答她的口腹之恩，幫她設計蛋糕Logo和購物網站。由於我媽娘家姓闕，取諧音「雀」以紅色書法大字，喚起消費者注意。小鳥翅膀以女人頭剪影代表雀姐，鳥的身體則是雀姐的頭髮，背景圖案以黃色基底加上大小白點，代表超濃郁起司蛋糕。
業主從事新聞攝影多年，想將攝工作室結合寵物餐廳， 故LOGO設計融合狗和相機，將相機用線條呈現，狗則和鏡頭結合，用黑色區塊形成一體。狗仔「PAPARAZZI」字樣放在鏡頭中間，壓縮成圓形凸起，讓鏡頭和狗身體更有立體感。狗尾巴貌似舔舌狀，代表這裡除了可以拍照、有小狗，也有美食。
許多人都夢想退休後開間咖啡廳，我也不例外，既然是彰顯個人特色的LOGO，主視覺以大頭造形置入，由於我拍照愛做鬼臉，所以選了一張吐舌搞怪的表情，圓圈將頭框住，裡面以咖啡色為底色，象徵咖啡杯俯視圖，並在橘色邊框，以我的英文名字和個人網址環繞，感興趣的人可以透過網站，更深入了解我這個人。

works.src: images/捷運燈箱_南京復興模擬圖.jpg
works.thumb: images/捷運燈箱_南京復興模擬圖m.jpg

about.name: 程正邦
about.currentTitle: 三立新聞網 編輯組副組長
about.education: 輔仁大學大傳所、銘傳大學大傳系、復興商工美工科
about.bio:
遺傳愛畫畫媽媽的天賦，自幼美術課常拿高分，國中畢業曾報考復興美工，因自認缺乏創意沒去就讀，但我對影像熱情不減，專科畢業後，插大考取銘傳大學大眾傳播系，大三拍攝的戲劇短片，代表學校參加廣電比賽。
            服役期間，在金門當新聞兵，退伍後當過攝影助理、遊戲編輯，最後在《蘋果日報》生根落腳，從事新聞工作十餘年，《蘋果》易主後曾轉換跑道做美術設計、中天新聞記者，目前是三立新聞網小夜主管。
            面對大眾媒體轉型和自媒體興起，工作之餘持續進修，2020年完成輔大大眾傳播碩士學位，再到復興商工美工科念夜間部，加強手繪能力，復興畢業後，繼續留校旁聽廣告設計、室內設計課程，期望成為理論與實務並重的傳播人。

workExperience.title: 娛樂記者特勤中心副主任
workExperience.titleEn: Entertainment reporter, Deputy Director of Special Service Center

workExperience.companyEn: Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
workExperience.title: 出版部編輯

timeline.heading: 武術啟蒙之路
timeline.body: 嘆服美劇《馬蓋先》的足智多謀，以為化學有趣又實用，沒去念復興美工，選擇念環工科，後來發現自己粗枝大葉，不適合做實驗，倒是挺適合習武，受漫畫《拳兒》啟發，加入國術社，在武壇教練林仲曦指導下，習練八極拳、螳螂拳、太極拳、迷蹤拳、劈掛掌，參加全國大專院校國術比賽獲得拳術對練第五名。
timeline.institutionEn: Environmental Engineering Department of Southeast Polytechnic
timeline.headingEn: The Path to Martial Arts Enlightenment
timeline.bodyEn: Admiring the resourcefulness of the American TV series "Magical," and finding chemistry interesting and practical, I didn't go to Fu-Hsing Arts and Design, but chose to study environmental engineering. Later, I discovered that I was too careless and not suitable for doing experiments, but I was quite suited to martial arts. Inspired by the comic "Kenji," I joined the Chinese Martial Arts Club and, under the guidance of martial arts coach Lin Zhongxi, practiced Bajiquan, Mantis Boxing, Taijiquan, Mizongquan, and Piguazhang. I participated in the National College Martial Arts Competition and won fifth place in the boxing sparring competition.

timeline.heading: 練習英文會話
timeline.body: 大學畢業考研究所，由於英文未達低標無法口試，耿耿於懷，加上三不五時出國採訪，深感語言之重要，工作之餘到地球村補英日文，加強聽說能力。
timeline.bodyEn: When I took the graduate school entrance exam after graduating from university, I was unable to take the oral exam because my English level was below the minimum requirement, which bothered me. In addition, I often went abroad for interviews, which made me realize the importance of language. So, in my spare time, I went to Global Village to improve my English and Japanese and strengthen my listening and speaking skills.

timeline.heading: 學習人像打光
timeline.body: 一名好的攝影記者，不僅要能在新聞現場搶拍到畫面，也被期待在專題報導中，把人物或商品拍得精緻完美，而棚拍經驗正是我最缺乏的，一直很想到視丘攝影學院接受正統攝影教育，但實在無法放棄工作一年上全修班，只好報名基礎人像攝影班和台北攝影學會的人像外拍課體驗一下。
timeline.bodyEn: A good photojournalist not only needs to be able to capture images at the scene of a news event, but is also expected to take exquisite and perfect photos of people or products in feature reports. Studio shooting experience is exactly what I lack. I have always wanted to receive formal photography education at the Vision Photography Academy, but I really can't give up my job for a year to take a full course. So I enrolled in a basic portrait photography class and a portrait outdoor shooting course from the Taipei Photographic Society to experience it.

timeline.heading: 接觸實戰武術
timeline.body: 習練傳統武術多年，沒有實戰經驗，心中始終有點遺憾，在公司附近武館「傳龍會」陳建宇教練指導下，學習散打、柔術，參加陽明盃散打比賽，獲得男子組超重量級第三名，圖為昔日戰友和教練（背影）。
timeline.headingEn: Contact with real combat martial arts
timeline.bodyEn: Having practiced traditional martial arts for many years, I always felt a little regretful because I had no real combat experience. Under the guidance of Coach Chen Jianyu at the "Chuanlonghui" martial arts school near my company, I learned Sanda and Jiu-Jitsu. I participated in the Yangming Cup Sanda Competition and won the third place in the men's super heavyweight category. The picture shows my former comrades and coach (back view).

timeline.heading: 學習美工軟體
timeline.body: 鑑於大眾媒體轉型和自媒體的興起，深感所學之不足，到巨匠電腦學剪接特效、3D動畫、電腦繪圖、平面設計和網頁製作，為了熟練操作，同一門課選擇不同老師重修，幾乎把所有老師的課都上過一輪。
timeline.bodyEn: In light of the transformation of mass media and the rise of self-media, I felt that my knowledge was insufficient, so I went to Jujiang Computer to learn editing effects, 3D animation, computer graphics, graphic design and web page production. In order to master the operation, I chose different teachers to repeat the same course and took almost all the teachers' courses once.

timeline.heading: 琴聲飄揚學影視
timeline.body: 插大考取銘傳大學大傳系，選修電視組，在校園媒體銘傳電視台當助理，採訪校園新聞，畢業製作的劇情短片《TOMORROW IS TODAY》，代表學校參加廣電比賽，校慶快報比賽獲得團體第二名。
timeline.footer: 參加社團：吉他社銘傳成績單
timeline.institutionEn: Department of Mass Communication, Ming Chuan University
timeline.headingEn: The sound of the guitar floats as I learn film and television.
timeline.bodyEn: I was admitted to the Department of Mass Communication at Ming Chuan University through the transfer exam, majoring in television. I worked as an assistant at Ming Chuan TV, the campus media outlet, covering campus news. My graduation project was a short drama called "TOMORROW IS TODAY". I represented the university in a broadcasting competition and won second place in the team competition for the university's anniversary newsletter.

timeline.heading: 金門新聞兵
timeline.body: 大學畢業，自願到外島服役，原本是金門運指部政戰士，服役半年多，被挑選為新聞兵，到金防部支援到退伍，隨著司令視察部隊採訪軍聞，刊登在《正氣中華報》。
timeline.bodyEn: After graduating from university, he volunteered to serve on an outlying island. Originally a political soldier in the Kinmen Transportation Command, he served for more than half a year and was selected as a news soldier to support the Kinmen Defense Command until his discharge. He accompanied the commander to inspect the troops and interviewed military news, which was published in the "Zhengqi Zhonghua Bao" newspaper.

timeline.heading: 跟拍名人八卦
timeline.body: 退伍後當過攝影助理、遊戲編輯，最後在《蘋果日報》生根落腳，從特勤記者幹起，中間換線跑過唱片、綜藝新聞，繞了一圈回歸特勤中心擔任主管。
timeline.footer: 職務：娛樂記者、特勤中心副主任
timeline.bodyEn: After being discharged from the military, he worked as a photography assistant and game editor before finally settling down at Apple Daily, starting as a special operations reporter. He then switched to covering record and variety show news before returning to the Special Operations Center as a supervisor.

timeline.heading: 統計論文拿高分
timeline.body: 充實的兩年，修了60個學分，看了許多paper，沒日沒夜地趕報告，在院長洪雅慧教授指導下，完成碩士論文《反送中事件的第一人效果和第三人效果－以2020年台灣總統大選為例》。此外，還到大學部旁聽實務課程，加入柔道社和乙組一起練習對摔。
timeline.footer: 參加社團：柔道社 輔大成績單
timeline.institutionEn: Graduate Institute of Mass Communication, Fu Jen Catholic University
timeline.headingEn: Get high marks in statistics and master's thesis
timeline.bodyEn: Two fulfilling years: I completed 60 credits, read numerous papers, and worked tirelessly day and night on reports. Under the guidance of Dean Professor Hung Ya-hui, I finished my master's thesis, "The First-Person and Third-Person Effects of the Anti-Extradition Bill Incident—A Case Study of the 2020 Taiwan Presidential Election." In addition, I audited practical courses at the undergraduate level and joined the judo club, practicing wrestling with the second group.

timeline.heading: 正規設計教育
timeline.body: 巨匠電腦讓我學會了軟體操作，卻無法教我創意發想，報考台科、北科設計所失利後，興起到南陽街設計升學教室IDM上課的念頭，從設計理論和麥克筆表現技法學起，並到復興美工念夜間部，一償宿願，開始沒日沒夜趕圖的日子。
timeline.bodyEn: The computer taught me how to operate software, but it couldn't teach me creative ideas. After failing to get into the design departments of National Taiwan University of Science and Technology and Taipei Tech, I had the idea of ​​taking classes at the Nanyang Street Design College. I started by learning design theory and marker drawing techniques, and then went to Fuxing Art College for evening classes. I finally fulfilled my wish and began working day and night to finish my drawings.

timeline.heading: 轉換跑道做美術設計
timeline.body: 《蘋果》老闆黎智英被中共抓去關後，易主經營大裁員，我離開待了18年的公司，嘗試轉換跑道做設計相關的工作，在「辰紘行銷」當視覺設計，幫台北捷運設計活動海報、燈箱，還有政府標案提案設計，作品屢獲業主肯定，在比稿中勝出，發標執行。
timeline.headingEn: Change the track for art design
timeline.bodyEn: After Apple Daily's owner Jimmy Lai was arrested and imprisoned by the Chinese Communist Party, the company changed hands and laid off a large number of employees. I left the company where I had worked for 18 years and tried to switch careers to work in design. I worked as a visual designer at "Chenhong Marketing", designing event posters and light boxes for the Taipei Metro, as well as government tender proposals. My work was repeatedly recognized by the clients and won the bids.

timeline.heading: 練口條看畫面說故事
timeline.body: 在行銷公司待半年，想了解電視台運作，到中天電視政論節目當企劃，後來公司覺得我的新聞資歷做節目太可惜，把我調到新聞部做D-Live、發即時新聞，在中天電視當2年文字記者；2023年中天電視成立中天新聞網，缺能拍能寫的突發記者，又被調到網路新聞部門跑社會線。
timeline.headingEn: Practice speaking by telling a story based on pictures.
timeline.bodyEn: After spending half a year at a marketing company to learn about television station operations, I went to work as a planner for a political talk show on CTiTV. Later, the company felt it was a waste of my news experience to do programs, so they transferred me to the news department to do D-Live and broadcast breaking news. I worked as a print reporter at CTiTV for two years. In 2023, CTiTV established CTi News Network and lacked breaking news reporters who could shoot and write, so I was transferred to the online news department to cover social issues.

timeline.heading: 狂發稿衝流量兼版主
timeline.body: 在中天新聞網跑社會線期間，因為文筆好、工作認真，被三立新聞網挖角去當小夜主管，即使不用在外面跑新聞，仍在公司狂發稿衝流量，彌補小夜人力之不足，並幫政論節目發稿，兼任晚班版主。
timeline.headingEn: Publish articles like crazy to boost traffic and also serve as a forum moderator
timeline.bodyEn: While covering social issues for CTi News, she was poached by SET News as a night shift supervisor because of her good writing skills and hard work. Even though she didn't have to go out to cover news, she still published articles to boost traffic for the night shift, making up for the manpower shortage of the night shift, and also helped publish articles for political talk shows and served as the night shift moderator.

timeline.heading: 品學兼優畢業獲表揚
timeline.body: 為了彌補兒時沒念復興美工的遺憾，輔大碩士畢業2年後，又到復興商工美工科夜間部學畫畫，熱心服務的我獲選班代，每學期名列前茅拿獎學金，並通過人像速寫中階檢定，畢業展5幅作品入選，在美麗永安藝文中心展出，獲局長獎和教師會表揚。
timeline.institutionEn: Fuxing Commercial and Industrial Vocational College, Department of Fine Arts
timeline.headingEn: Graduated with excellent academic performance and moral character and received commendation
timeline.bodyEn: To make up for the regret of not studying at Fu-Hsing Commercial and Industrial Vocational High School when I was a child, I enrolled in the evening class of the art department at Fu-Hsing Commercial and Industrial Vocational High School two years after graduating with a master's degree from Fu Jen Catholic University. I was selected as a class representative because of my enthusiasm for service. I ranked at the top of my class every semester and received scholarships. I also passed the intermediate level of portrait sketching certification. Five of my works were selected for the graduation exhibition and were exhibited at the Beautiful Yong-An Arts and Culture Center. I received the Director's Award and the Teachers' Association Commendation.

about.educationEn: Graduate Institute of Mass Communication, Fu Jen Catholic University
about.bioEn:
Inheriting my mother's talent for drawing, I consistently scored high marks in art classes from a young age. After graduating from junior high school, I applied to Fu-Hsing Arts and Vocational High School, but declined due to a perceived lack of creativity. However, my passion for visual media remained undiminished. After graduating from junior college, I transferred to Ming Chuan University's Department of Mass Communication. In my junior year, I filmed a short drama that represented the school in a broadcasting competition.

During my military service, I served as a news soldier in Kinmen. After my discharge, I worked as a photography assistant and game editor before finally settling down at Apple Daily, where I worked in journalism for over ten years. After Apple Daily changed hands, I transitioned to art design and became a reporter for CTi News. Currently, I am the night shift supervisor for SET News Network.

Faced with the transformation of mass media and the rise of social media, I continued my studies in my spare time. In 2020, I completed a Master's degree in Mass Communication from Fu Jen Catholic University. I then pursued a nighttime degree in Art and Design at Fu-Hsing Commercial and Industrial Vocational High School to enhance my hand-drawing skills. After graduating from Fu-Hsing, I stayed on as an auditor for advertising design and interior design courses, hoping to become a communicator with both theoretical and practical expertise.

meta.description: 一個熱愛學習的中年大叔，從事新聞工作十餘年，興趣是武術、音樂和影像創作，這是我的作品集網站，包括平面設計、3D動畫、攝影剪接、插畫，和過去採訪的新聞剪報。
